item.title: Minnesota immigration enforcement surge is ending, Trump border tsar says
item.description: Two US citizens were killed in Minneapolis during the crackdown dubbed "Operation Metro Surge".

item.title: Port city in ruins as storm rips through Madagascar and on towards Mozambique
item.description: More than half the population is affected and most infrastructure destroyed in Toamasina, Madagascar's main port.

item.title: Two US Navy ships collide near South America
item.description: Two people involved in the operation suffered minor injuries and are in stable condition, the US military said.

item.title: Polls close in first election since Gen Z protests ousted Bangladesh leader
item.description: Voters are hoping for a return to democracy after 15 years of authoritarian rule under Sheikh Hasina.

item.title: Prince Harry thanks bereaved families taking on social media firms
item.description: The Duke of Sussex addressed parents claiming Instagram and YouTube damage young people's mental health.
